failure_reason: Validated the supported CPU/GPU/ML hardware-lane JIT floor and the measurable oracle-learning choice floor. Hati target rows now carry clang oracle triples, Form-native JIT runtime rows, and assembly surfaces for macOS arm64 and Android arm64; hati-os-targets-band returns 4095, jit-metal-lanes-band returns 4095, jit-oracle-learning-band returns 1023, form-lower-rec-band returns 31, and bml-hati-native-floor-proof returns 16. The audit proves Form-native CPU/GPU/ML emitter lanes and oracle/native choice samples first, then uses clang as oracle to emit Mach-O arm64 and ELF aarch64 object receipts for BML/Hati and Form jit_emit_c.
